questionHtml: Hence determine, with a reason, which model provides a more consistent experience for the player with respect to boosted actions.
markschemeHtml:
since VarX>VarY, 2nd model provides more consistent experience          R1

 

Note: Only award R1 FT if both their variances are positive.

[1 mark]
